items.title: Agent template system
items.description: Bundled templates (dev, qa, pm) with apply_template() and CLI integration.

items.title: Config loader and adapter registry
items.description: load_config() reads cortiva.yaml, build_fabric() instantiates adapters via dict registry.

items.title: cortiva start command
items.description: CLI command that loads config, builds fabric, runs heartbeat with signal handling.

items.title: Slack channel adapter
items.description: Polling-based adapter using AsyncWebClient for send/receive/listen.

items.title: Routine adapter (Ollama)
items.description: Subconscious layer using local Ollama models for triage and context assembly.

items.title: Familiarity signal computation
items.description: Compute familiarity from memory search results to route tasks between conscious/routine.

items.title: Memory integration in fabric cycle
items.description: Retrieve relevant memories during cycle() and inject into execution context.

items.title: Agent-to-agent messaging
items.description: Allow agents to send messages to each other via the channel adapter.

items.title: Consciousness budget dashboard
items.description: CLI command to show per-agent consciousness usage and remaining budget.

items.title: Journal viewer CLI
items.description: CLI command to read and display agent journal entries.

items.title: OpenAI consciousness adapter
items.description: Alternative consciousness adapter using OpenAI API.

items.title: Discord channel adapter
items.description: Channel adapter for Discord bot integration.

items.title: Neo4j memory adapter
items.description: Graph-based memory adapter for relationship-aware recall.

items.title: Agent cloning
items.description: Clone an agent's identity files to create a new agent with inherited experience.

items.title: Adversarial QA auditing
items.description: Automated adversarial testing of agent outputs for safety and correctness.

items.title: Persona evolution tracking
items.description: Track how agent identity files change over time with diff history.

items.title: Multi-workspace support
items.description: Allow multiple Cortiva workspaces with shared agent identities.

items.title: Web dashboard
items.description: Browser-based dashboard for monitoring agent status and reading journals.
